generated_exposure.exposure_text: Did you know that our civil defense systems are being weakened by bureaucratic incompetence? While we debate preparedness, foreign actors exploit our divisions. Last year, a single cyberattack on our power grid could have been catastrophic if not for luck. Who's really to blame? The same politicians who prioritize partisan fights over real security. It's time to demand accountability and invest in robust civil defense. #NationalSecurity #CivilDefense
